game.notes: Synthetic three-power negotiation, all inputs traceable to the situation text.

evidence.note: Aland wants 2030 and is the most economically powerful.

assumptions.statement: Capabilities are scaled with Aland at 100 as the strongest.
assumptions.why: The situation states only that Aland is the most economically powerful, not exact capability ratios.

assumptions.statement: Saliences reflect each power's stated insistence on its date.
assumptions.why: The situation gives positions but no explicit salience figures.

template_classification.rationale: Three actors with divergent positions on a one-dimensional issue and unequal power bargain toward a single outcome — the median-voter / coalition bargaining pattern.
